home.title: Choose an exam
home.subtitle: Practice tests for preparation
home.trialCtaSub: 2 free trials are available right after sign-in
home.trialCtaPremium: Premium is active — UNT trial access is unlimited
home.dailyLimitReached: Daily attempt limit reached. Access in {{countdown}}

mistakes.title: Mistakes & progress
mistakes.subtitle: Repeat questions you got wrong and track when you fix them.
mistakes.openHint: We take your latest result per question from finished tests. Wrong or skipped counts as a mistake until you answer correctly in another completed test.
mistakes.pickExam: You have mistakes in several exams — pick one to practice.
mistakes.historyHint: Shown when your answer was wrong in an earlier finished test and correct in a later one.
mistakes.noHistory: No fixes recorded yet — keep practicing.
mistakes.logicFootnote: How it works: only finished and timed-out tests count. Your latest attempt per question decides if a mistake is still open. Completing a mistake-review session updates this list.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Top full UNT practice results. Only each student's best result appears in the ranking.
leaderboard.noRankHint: Finish a full UNT test to enter the ranking
leaderboard.emptyText: Finish a full 120-question UNT test and your result will appear here.
leaderboard.error: Could not load the leaderboard. Try refreshing the page.

exam.chooseProfileHint: Select 2 profile subjects for your test
exam.chooseProfileOptionalHint: Profile subjects can be selected optionally
exam.entPassFormatLead: Three modes: mandatory block only, two profile subjects only, or full UNT.
exam.entVariantLead: Pick one of three formats. Block size matches the full practice template.
exam.entQuestionLanguageLead: Language of the question wording in this test. The app interface language stays the same.
exam.templatePickHint: Tap a card below — e.g. full practice or express. You must pick one before starting.
exam.noTemplates: No test templates for this exam. Run seeds or configure templates in admin.
exam.noAccessTitle: Access to this exam is limited
exam.noAccessText: Purchase or activate a suitable plan to continue.

test.question: Question {{current}} of {{total}}
test.keyboardOptionsHint: Keys 1–9 or A–H to select an answer

profile.title: Profile

auth.seoDescription: Sign in with your phone number: a one-time code in Telegram, no password.

auth.authStep1: Tap the button below — the bot opens in Telegram, no command to type
auth.authStep2: Send your number in the bot — the code arrives in that chat right away
auth.authStep3: Enter your phone and the code here on the site
auth.authAlreadyHaveCode: I already have the code in Telegram
auth.subscribeRequired: Subscribe to our channel to get started
auth.telegramPhoneRequired: Please share your phone number in the bot first, then open MyTest again.
auth.telegramRetry: I've shared my phone — retry sign-in

channel.seoDescription: Subscribe to the MyTest Telegram channel to access practice tests.
channel.title: Subscribe to the channel
channel.description: You need to subscribe to our Telegram channel to access the tests

paywall.title: Continue after 2 free trials
paywall.exhausted: Free limit is exhausted. Choose a plan to continue UNT trials and analytics.
paywall.dailyLimitReached: Daily attempt limit reached. Access in {{countdown}}
paywall.active: You already have an active Premium plan. No additional purchase is needed now.
paywall.statusSuccess: Payment was successful. Access will be activated within a minute.
paywall.statusFail: Payment was not completed. You can choose a plan and retry.
paywall.whatsappIntro: Hello! I would like to buy the "{{planName}}" plan for {{price}} KZT
paywall.invoiceModalDescription: Enter the phone number to issue the invoice to — it will be included in the WhatsApp message.

chance.pageLead: Fill required filters to view matching programs and universities with passing scores for the selected year.
chance.pickProgramHint: Select a program on the left to see universities.
chance.fillRequired: Fill required fields: year, quota, profile subjects and UNT scores.
chance.noPrograms: No matching programs for these filters.
chance.noUniversities: No universities found for the selected program.
chance.apiUnavailable: Admission reference data is temporarily unavailable.
chance.cutoffNoteP1: The cutoff scores shown are the minimum totals with which applicants were admitted on a grant to the listed university and program.
chance.cutoffNoteP2: These figures can change from year to year — up or down — depending on applicants’ preparation, the number of grants, and competition for each specialty.

heroSlides.title: Exam preparation in one place
heroSlides.subtitle: Timer, mistake analytics, and progress tracking across subjects.

landing.marqueeLine: ENT · NIS · NUET · KTL · Telegram · timer · mistakes · progress · kk · ru · en
landing.heroLead: Clear, structured preparation: UNT-style practice tests and more, analytics by topic and subject, progress over time and mistake review. Sign in with Telegram — no separate password.
landing.ticketFoot: Not “yet another question bank” — practice for staying calm under time pressure.
landing.stripeQuote: MyTest is not just a set of tests. It is a system that brings together diagnostics, analysis and growth in one learning space.
landing.grantLead: 2026-style model: three mandatory subjects (10+10+20 points) plus two profile subjects (50 each). You must meet the minimum (шекті балл) on every subject — otherwise you cannot enter the competition. Simplified hint only; not an official grant score.
landing.grantThresholdsOk: All five minimums are met in this model.
landing.grantThresholdsFail: At least one subject is below the minimum — adjust the sliders.
landing.grantTierBlocked: Reach the minimum on each subject first — we don’t show a grant hint below that.
landing.grantTierGrow: Minimums OK, but the total is still low for typical grant cut-offs — push mandatory and profile blocks.
landing.grantTierBase: Total is in a common “~50+” band for some universities — verify the programme threshold.
landing.grantTierNational: Total is in a “~65+” band often cited for national universities — competition still depends on the major.
landing.grantTierStrong: High total (~75+) — often cited for the toughest majors; real outcomes depend on the ranking list and year.
landing.grantDisclaimer: The 50 / 65 / 75 bands are illustrative from public overviews, not legal norms. Follow the ministry and admissions office.
landing.grantPastCutoff: Cut-off in the selected dataset: {{cutoff}}. Gap vs your total: {{gap}} (non-negative means above that past cut-off).
landing.grantNoCutoff: No numeric cut-off for this combination in the table.
landing.grantNoSeed: No admission cycles in the API yet — run DB migrations and the grant admission seed.
landing.grantApiUnavailable: Reference data is unavailable — you still see totals and minimum thresholds.
landing.grantCutoffDisclaimer: Figures reflect past competition; the current year may differ.
landing.platformLead: Tools that help you see the full picture — from one attempt to topics and dynamics over time.

platformFeatures.title: Student progress
platformFeatures.body: Track progress across exams, subjects and topics; compare results with classmates, your district and national peers.

platformFeatures.title: Mistake review
platformFeatures.body: After each test, review every mistake: correct answers, explanations and linked topics.

platformFeatures.title: Topic analytics
platformFeatures.body: Detailed breakdown by topic to spot weak areas and learning trends.

platformFeatures.title: Cut-off scores
platformFeatures.body: Analytics on cut-off scores by field over recent years — context for exam requirements and how they change.

landing.directionsLead: Share of profile combinations among platform users (indicative).

testimonials.quote: March and January UNT questions were very different from our school mocks, but here the difficulty is as close as possible to the real exam.
testimonials.author: Samgat Zhumali

testimonials.quote: Students love how convenient the platform and UI are. It matters that repeated tests have minimal question repetition.
testimonials.author: Narbek Orazbek

landing.instructionLead: A short walkthrough of the essentials: starting a practice test, what to keep in mind during the session, and where to review your analytics and mistakes afterward.
landing.leadTitle: Leave a request — we'll contact you
landing.leadSubtitle: Send your contact details and an admin will get back to you shortly.
landing.leadMessagePlaceholder: Best time to call or your question
landing.leadSuccess: Request sent. We will contact you soon.
landing.leadError: Failed to send request. Please try again.
landing.aboutLead: MyTest is an educational platform for school students: exam preparation and systematic improvement of learning outcomes. We make preparation clearer, more transparent and more structured.
landing.aboutBody: Preparation often means many disconnected tests — it is hard to see your real level and progress. MyTest brings this into one system.
landing.aboutClosing: After each test you get analytics by topic, subject and mastery; plus progress over time, mistake review and cut-off analytics for recent years.

aboutFacts.title: Mission
aboutFacts.body: We turn preparation into a clear growth system: help students learn more effectively, understand their level and unlock their potential.

aboutFacts.title: Who we are
aboutFacts.body: We are an educational platform that turns preparation into a clear growth system and helps students prepare for exams effectively, conveniently and mindfully.

aboutFacts.title: What sets us apart
aboutFacts.body: We don’t just offer tests — we turn preparation into a system with deep analytics where students see their real level, progress and weak spots.

landing.trialLead: After Telegram sign-in you can pass two full UNT trial sessions. On the third attempt, pricing and payment are shown.

trialFeatures.title: Two launches without card
trialFeatures.body: No payment required for the first two trial attempts.

trialFeatures.title: Full mock flow
trialFeatures.body: Timer, section logic, mandatory and profile blocks — not a simplified demo.

trialFeatures.title: Clear paywall after limit
trialFeatures.body: When free attempts are exhausted, pricing is transparent and plan-based.

trialFeatures.title: Single account history
trialFeatures.body: Your attempts, mistakes and progress stay in one profile after Telegram sign-in.

landing.pricingFootnote: Prices and durations match the in-app paywall. You always see the final total before Freedom Pay checkout.

pricingTiers.name: Trial
features: Access to one full test run

pricingTiers.name: Week
features: Limits lifted for the access period

pricingTiers.name: Annual
features: Best price per day of access
Catalog updates for the subscription term

landing.seoTitle: MyTest — UNT, NIS, NUET practice tests online | Kazakhstan
landing.seoDescription: MyTest for school students: UNT and other exam prep, analytics by topic and subject, progress, mistake review and cut-off score context. Sign in with Telegram.
landing.seoKeywords: UNT online, NIS test, NUET practice, Kazakhstan exams, college prep, mytest, trial exam
landing.seoOgImageAlt: MyTest — online exam practice platform for Kazakhstan
landing.seoHowToDescription: Use your phone in the bot and on the site, pick an exam type and launch a timed practice session.

seoFaq.question: How is MyTest different from a question bank?
seoFaq.answer: We mimic exam rhythm: timer, sections and navigation — training the habit of finishing under pressure, not only reading questions.

seoFaq.question: Do I need a separate password?
seoFaq.answer: No. You enter the phone number you shared with the bot; the code arrives in Telegram.

seoFaq.question: Which exam formats are supported?
seoFaq.answer: The catalog includes UNT-, NIS-, NUET-, KTL- and physmath-style formats. Section layout depends on the template you choose.

seoFaq.question: Is there mistake review?
seoFaq.answer: Yes. After a test you can work on mistakes and track what you have already fixed.

seoFaq.question: Which UI languages are available?
seoFaq.answer: Kazakh, Russian and English — switch from the landing page.

benefits.title: One trajectory
benefits.body: Instead of scattered tests — one connected flow: you see level, progress and what to focus on next.

benefits.title: Breakdown after each test
benefits.body: Detailed analysis by topic, subject and mastery — so you know strengths and weaknesses.

benefits.title: Progress over time
benefits.body: Track how your results change: how you move toward your goal and where to push harder.

benefits.title: Mistake review
benefits.body: Every wrong answer can be unpacked: the right solution and the related topic.

benefits.title: Cut-offs and trends
benefits.body: Cut-off score data from recent years — context for exam requirements.

steps.title: Sign in with Telegram
steps.body: Open the bot from the site link, enter your phone in the bot — the code arrives in Telegram right away, then enter phone and code on the site.

steps.title: Pick exam & template
steps.body: Add profile subjects if needed and launch a timed session.

steps.title: Finish and review mistakes
steps.body: Read the breakdown and return to weak spots in a dedicated practice flow.

landingV3.heroH1: Practice like it's the real exam — track your real progress.
landingV3.heroLead: Timed UNT trials, detailed analytics, mistake review. Sign in with Telegram in seconds. No passwords, no friction — just focused practice that moves the needle.
landingV3.heroMicro: 2 free trials · No credit card required

proofItems.title: Timed practice sessions
proofItems.body: Every test mirrors the real exam rhythm: timer, sections, navigation. Build stamina before the real day.

proofItems.title: Mistakes become lessons
proofItems.body: Review every wrong answer with explanations. Return to weak spots until they're fixed — not just marked.

proofItems.title: Progress over time
proofItems.body: See your trajectory across attempts. Know exactly which topics need more work and how far you've come.

landingV3.pipelineTitle: From sign-in to first insight in minutes
landingV3.pipelineSub: No lengthy setup. No confusing dashboards. Just open, practice, learn.

pipelineSteps.title: Sign in via Telegram
pipelineSteps.body: Open the bot, share your phone, get the code. Enter it on the site. Done in under a minute.

pipelineSteps.title: Pick your exam format
pipelineSteps.body: UNT, NIS, NUET, KTL — choose the format and variant. Add profile subjects if needed.

pipelineSteps.title: Review and repeat
pipelineSteps.body: After each session: see scores, read explanations, practice mistakes. Track your growth over time.

landingV3.bentoLead: Not just a question bank — a complete system for tracking, analyzing, and improving.

bentoItems.title: Topic-by-topic breakdown
bentoItems.body: After each test, see exactly which topics are your strongest and which need attention.

bentoItems.title: Real exam conditions
bentoItems.body: Timer, section navigation, mandatory + profile blocks — practice in the format you'll face.

bentoItems.title: Personal best tracking
bentoItems.body: Your highest scores, accuracy rates, and time spent — all visible in one place.

bentoItems.title: Mistake review sessions
bentoItems.body: Dedicated practice flows focused only on what you got wrong. Close gaps systematically.

bentoItems.title: Multiple exam formats
bentoItems.body: UNT-style, NIS, NUET, KTL — each with proper section logic and scoring rules.

bentoItems.title: Three interface languages
bentoItems.body: Kazakh, Russian, English. Switch anytime. Question text follows your chosen language.

landingV3.admitBody: Reference data on passing scores by program, university and quota from recent admission cycles — so you know what target to aim for.
landingV3.admitNote: Free for the first two attempts
landingV3.videoLead: In a couple of minutes we'll show you the essentials: how to start a practice test, what to watch during the session, and where to find your analytics and mistakes afterward.
landingV3.faqLead: Quick answers before you dive in.

faqItems.question: What's included in the free trial?
faqItems.answer: Two full UNT practice attempts — same format, timer and sections as the real exam. No payment required to start.

faqItems.question: How do I sign in?
faqItems.answer: Open the Telegram bot, share your phone number, receive the code in the bot chat. Enter your phone and the code on the site. That's it — no separate password.

faqItems.question: Which exam formats are available?
faqItems.answer: UNT-style (the main format for university admission), NIS (Nazarbayev Intellectual Schools), NUET, and KTL. Each has its own section structure and scoring.

faqItems.question: Is there mistake review?
faqItems.answer: Yes. After each test you can review every wrong answer, read explanations, and practice those questions in a dedicated flow until you get them right.

faqItems.question: What happens after the free limit?
faqItems.answer: You'll see transparent pricing for weekly, monthly, and annual plans. No hidden fees — the total is shown before any payment.

faqItems.question: Can I track progress over time?
faqItems.answer: Absolutely. Your profile shows score trends, accuracy by subject and topic, personal bests, and total time spent practicing.

landingV3.closingTitle: Ready to see where you stand?
landingV3.closingSub: Two free attempts. Real exam conditions. Start today.
landingV3.seoTitle: MyTest — Practice like it's the real exam
landingV3.seoDescription: Timed UNT trials, detailed analytics, mistake review. Sign in with Telegram in seconds. 2 free trials.
